name: @bytetrue/pi-subagent
description_en: Pi extension: Claude Code-style subagents. Delegate tasks to isolated, per-agent provider/model-configurable specialists (general-purpose, explore, plan) defined as Markdown files, driven entirely through tools (no TUI required).
description_zh: Pi 扩展：Claude Code 风格的子代理。将任务委托给隔离的、每个代理提供者/模型可配置的专家（通用型、探索型、规划型），定义为 Markdown 文件，完全通过工具驱动（无需 TUI）
